creator: yonas@fizk.net
text:
It appears the gcc5, gcc-ecj, and binutils packages will be installed when installing the audacity package:


New packages to be INSTALLED:
        audacity: 2.1.3
        gcc5: 5.4.0_3
        gcc-ecj: 4.5
        binutils: 2.28,1
        vamp-plugin-sdk: 2.6
        ladspa: 1.13_1


These might be build dependencies, but shouldn't be runtime dependencies.
